---
title: "Next.js app (Bun)"
description: "Build a Next.js app template with Bun."
---

# Next.js app (Bun)

This example uses Bun to create a Next.js app and starts the development server on port `3000`.

## Template definition

```go
package main

import e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"

var template = e2b.Template(nil).
	FromBunImage("1.3").
	SetWorkdir("/home/user/nextjs-app").
	RunCmd("bun create next-app --app --ts --tailwind --turbopack --yes --use-bun .").
	RunCmd("bunx --bun shadcn@latest init -d").
	RunCmd("bunx --bun shadcn@latest add --all").
	RunCmd("mv /home/user/nextjs-app/* /home/user/ && rm -rf /home/user/nextjs-app").
	SetWorkdir("/home/user").
	SetStartCmd("bun run dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000", e2b.WaitForURL("http://127.0.0.1:3000"))
```

## Build

```go
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"

	e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"
)

func main() {
	buildInfo, err := e2b.Build(context.Background(), template, "nextjs-app-bun", &e2b.BuildOptions{
		BasicBuildOptions: e2b.BasicBuildOptions{
			CpuCount:    4,
			MemoryMB:    4096,
			OnBuildLogs: e2b.DefaultBuildLogger(),
		},
	})
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	log.Println(buildInfo.TemplateID)
}
```

## Create a sandbox and open the app

```go
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"

	e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"
)

func main() {
	sandbox, err := e2b.Create(context.Background(), "nextjs-app-bun", nil)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer sandbox.Kill(context.Background(), nil)

	log.Println("App URL:", "https://"+sandbox.GetHost(3000))
}
```
